sys_update_xml.name: sys_script_1e2467603bd04b1075e10964c3e45a58
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update sys_domain="global" table="sys_script"><sys_script action="DELETE"><abort_action>false</abort_action><access>package_private</access><action_delete>false</action_delete><action_insert>true</action_insert><action_query>false</action_query><action_update>true</action_update><active>true</active><add_message>false</add_message><advanced>true</advanced><change_fields>false</change_fields><client_callable>false</client_callable><collection>sn_lead_mgmt_core_lead</collection><condition/><description/><execute_function>false</execute_function><filter_condition/><is_rest>false</is_rest><message/><name>Calculate Lead Score and Rating</name><order>100</order><priority>100</priority><rest_method/><rest_method_text/><rest_service/><rest_service_text/><rest_variables/><role_conditions/><script><![CDATA[(function executeRule(current, previous) {

    var dt = new sn_dt.DecisionTableAPI();

    var inputs = {
        has_email: !gs.nil(current.email),
        has_mobile: !gs.nil(current.mobile_phone),
        industry: current.industry + ""
    };

    var result = dt.getDecision('Lead Scoring Decision', inputs);

    if (result) {
        var outputs = result.getOutputs();

        if (outputs) {
            current.setValue('lead_score', outputs.lead_score);
            current.setValue('lead_rating', outputs.lead_rating);
        }
    }

})(current, previous);]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>rimkumari</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-04-14 05:23:57</sys_created_on><sys_customer_update>false</sys_customer_update><sys_domain>global</sys_domain><sys_domain_path>/</sys_domain_path><sys_id>1e2467603bd04b1075e10964c3e45a58</sys_id><sys_mod_count>2</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Calculate Lead Score and Rating</sys_name><sys_overrides/><sys_package display_value="Lead Management Data Model" source="sn_lead_mgmt_core">909d679343333110144160b6ccb8f2ee</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_replace_on_upgrade>false</sys_replace_on_upgrade><sys_scope display_value="Lead Management Data Model">909d679343333110144160b6ccb8f2ee</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_1e2467603bd04b1075e10964c3e45a58</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>rimkumari</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-04-14 09:16:52</sys_updated_on><template/><when>before</when></sys_script><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=1e2467603bd04b1075e10964c3e45a58"/></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_script_ae6c9cf43bd0cb1075e10964c3e45a0e
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update sys_domain="global" table="sys_script"><sys_script action="DELETE"><abort_action>false</abort_action><access>package_private</access><action_delete>false</action_delete><action_insert>false</action_insert><action_query>false</action_query><action_update>false</action_update><active>true</active><add_message>false</add_message><advanced>true</advanced><change_fields>false</change_fields><client_callable>false</client_callable><collection>sn_lead_mgmt_core_lead</collection><condition/><description/><execute_function>false</execute_function><filter_condition/><is_rest>false</is_rest><message/><name>Calculate Lead Scoring</name><order>100</order><priority>100</priority><rest_method/><rest_method_text/><rest_service/><rest_service_text/><rest_variables/><role_conditions/><script><![CDATA[(function executeRule(current, previous) {
 
    var score = 0;
 
    // Mobile phone present
    if (current.mobile_phone) {
        score += 15;
    }
 
    // Industry-based scoring
    if (current.industry == "manufacturing") {
        score += 20;
    } else if (current.industry == "healthcare") {
        score += 25;
    } else if (current.industry == "technology_services") {
        score += 30;
    } else if (current.industry == "bio_technology") {
        score += 35;
    }
 
    // Example extra condition (optional but useful)
    if (current.email) {
        score += 10;
    }
 
    // Set decimal lead score
    current.lead_score = score;
 
    // Set lead rating based on score
    if (score < 25) {
        current.lead_rating = "100_cold";
    } else if (score < 50) {
        current.lead_rating = "200_warm";
    } else if (score < 75) {
        current.lead_rating = "300_hot";
    } else {
        current.lead_rating = "400_super_hot";
    }
 
})(current, previous);]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>rimkumari</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-04-14 09:28:27</sys_created_on><sys_customer_update>false</sys_customer_update><sys_domain>global</sys_domain><sys_domain_path>/</sys_domain_path><sys_id>ae6c9cf43bd0cb1075e10964c3e45a0e</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Calculate Lead Scoring</sys_name><sys_overrides/><sys_package display_value="Lead Management Data Model" source="sn_lead_mgmt_core">909d679343333110144160b6ccb8f2ee</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_replace_on_upgrade>false</sys_replace_on_upgrade><sys_scope display_value="Lead Management Data Model">909d679343333110144160b6ccb8f2ee</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_ae6c9cf43bd0cb1075e10964c3e45a0e</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>rimkumari</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-04-14 09:28:27</sys_updated_on><template/><when>before</when></sys_script><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=ae6c9cf43bd0cb1075e10964c3e45a0e"/></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sp_widget_10cc9968eb1ccb108deef07fbad0cd82
sys_update_xml.payload: customc/* REMOVE SERVICENOW PADDING */ .container, .row { padding-left: 0 !important; padding-right: 0 !important; margin-left: 0 !important; margin-right: 0 !important; } /* FULL WIDTH FIX */ .vx-full { width: 100vw; margin-left: calc(-50vw + 50%); } /* SECTION */ .vx-products { background: #0d0d0d; padding: 80px 40px; } /* TITLE */ .vx-title { font-family: "Montserrat", sans-serif; font-size: 56px; font-weight: 800; color: white; text-align: center; margin-bottom: 60px; } /* GRID */ .vx-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 30px; max-width: 1200px; margin: auto; } /* CARD */ .vx-card { height: 300px; perspective: 1000px; } /* INNER */ .vx-inner { position: relative; width: 100%; height: 100%; transition: transform 0.6s; transform-style: preserve-3d; } /* FLIP */ .vx-card:hover .vx-inner { transform: rotateY(180deg); } /* FRONT & BACK */ .vx-front, .vx-back { position: absolute; width: 100%; height: 100%; backface-visibility: hidden; border-radius: 10px; overflow: hidden; } /* FRONT */ .vx-front { background: #1a1a1a; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; } .vx-front img { width: 100%; height: 200px; object-fit: cover; } .vx-front h3 { color: white; margin-top: 10px; } /* BACK */ .vx-back { background: #e8931a; color: white; transform: rotateY(180deg); display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; align-items: center; padding: 20px; text-align: center; } /* RESPONSIVE */ @media(max-width: 900px){ .vx-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2,1fr); } } @media(max-width: 600px){ .vx-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }sp_instancefalsevorrex_productsfalseVorrex Products Sectiontruefalsesp_widgetsaanjain2026-04-13 19:37:30false10cc9968eb1ccb108deef07fbad0cd8210Vorrex Products Section909d679343333110144160b6ccb8f2eefalse909d679343333110144160b6ccb8f2eesp_widget_10cc9968eb1ccb108deef07fbad0cd82saanjain2026-04-13 20:01:32
